message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T00:19 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.text: All steps complete on this wisp. Squashing and starting fresh patrol.
